settings.title: Sustainable Bikini Tops That Flatter, Support & Stay On
settings.text:
Our bikini tops are made for women who live for the water — designed to move with you through every wave, dive, and sun-soaked moment. Each style in this collection blends timeless design with high-performance function, offering a flattering fit that stays put whether you’re surfing, swimming, or lounging poolside.

From the classic triangle bikini top to the sleek one shoulder top and sporty surf bikini top, every piece is crafted from luxurious Italian recycled fabric that feels silky-soft yet built to last. Our womens rashguard tops and long sleeve rash guards offer UPF 50+ sun protection, giving you the confidence to stay covered and comfortable during long ocean days.

At Ocean Soul Swimwear, we believe sustainability and style should go hand in hand. Every eco-friendly bikini top in this collection is ethically handmade in Bali, produced in small batches using Econyl® regenerated nylon — a fabric made from discarded fishing nets and ocean waste.

Each design has been refined over years to ensure it performs as beautifully as it looks. Adjustable straps, sculpting panels, and seamless finishes create a second-skin feel that flatters every curve and never digs in.

Whether you love the sporty energy of a surf bikini top, the feminine minimalism of a triangle bikini top, or the modern asymmetry of a one shoulder top, you’ll find your perfect match in this consciously crafted collection.

Luxury meets longevity — built to last, designed to move, and made for women who live in the ocean.

settings.title: Favourite bikini top!
settings.text: 'I always have trouble finding bikini tops that stay on with a bigger bust and this one is so perfect. Love the cover and love the fit!!'

settings.title: Find Your Perfect Bikini Top
settings.text:
Triangle Bikini Tops

A timeless classic, our triangle bikini tops are reimagined for the active modern woman. Adjustable ties at the neck and back let you customise your fit, while double lining provides security and confidence in and out of the water. Crafted from recycled Italian fabric, they’re soft, sculpting, and sustainable.

Adjustable straps for personalised comfort

Seamless edges that sit smooth on the skin

Quick-dry, fade-resistant fabric that holds its shape

Whether you’re catching waves or soaking up the sun, the triangle bikini top offers the perfect mix of elegance and ease.

settings.title: Surf Bikini Tops
settings.text:
Made for movement, our surf bikini tops are built to stay on through every duck dive and paddle-out. These are not your average bikinis — they’re tested in real surf to ensure they deliver a secure, supportive fit without compromising style.

Sporty silhouette with flattering contour seams

Premium stretch fabric for unrestricted motion

Secure hold through surf, swim, and SUP

Pair your surf bikini top with our high-waisted bikini bottoms or women’s rashguard tops for ultimate comfort and coverage on the water.

settings.title: One Shoulder Tops
settings.text:
Our one shoulder tops are for women who want something effortlessly chic yet completely functional. The asymmetric neckline adds a modern edge, while the supportive construction keeps everything in place. Perfect for beach days, boat trips, or as a statement top beyond the sand.

Supportive single-strap design for comfort and style

Double-lined recycled fabric for lift and hold

Seamless finish for a smooth, sculpted look

Available in classic black, soft neutrals, and seasonal hues, the one shoulder top is the ultimate blend of sophistication and performance.

settings.title: Women’s Rashguard Tops
settings.text:
When you want more coverage without sacrificing style, our women’s rashguard tops are the perfect fit. Designed for long days in and around the water, they provide UPF 50+ protection, are breathable, and feel buttery-soft against the skin.

Each women rash guard in our collection is cut to flatter — fitted through the body with just enough stretch to move with you through every session.

High-performance Italian recycled fabric

Flat seams to prevent irritation

Tailored cut that flatters the female shape

Ethically handmade in Bali

Pair your womens rashguard top with a seamless bikini bottom or surf short for the perfect combination of coverage and confidence.

settings.title: How to Style Your Bikini Tops
settings.text:
Our bikini tops are designed to transition effortlessly from water to land:

Active Days: Pair your surf bikini top or rashguard top with high-waisted bottoms or surf shorts for full mobility and protection.

Relaxed Days: Match a triangle bikini top or one shoulder top with a resort sarong or wide-legged lounge pants for effortless coastal chic.

Travel Ready: Lightweight and quick-drying, perfect for packing in your beach tote or weekend getaway bag.

Add a bamboo clutch or tote wet bag for a polished, practical finish.

settings.heading: Sustainable Craftsmanship, Built to Last
settings.subheading_text:
Every bikini top in this collection is part of our commitment to sustainable luxury. Made from Econyl® regenerated nylon, each piece helps clean our oceans while delivering the high performance you expect from premium swimwear.

Ethically Made in Bali: Supporting local artisans with fair wages and safe working conditions.

Small-Batch Production: Reducing waste and avoiding overproduction.

Durable Design: Retains colour and shape through countless wears.

When you choose Ocean Soul, you’re not just choosing swimwear — you’re joining a movement toward conscious, long-lasting fashion.

settings.title: Shop the Collection
settings.text:
Discover your perfect bikini top — whether you prefer sporty, feminine, or minimalist designs. Choose from:

Triangle Bikini Tops – adjustable and timeless.

Surf Bikini Tops – supportive and surf-tested.

One Shoulder Tops – elegant and sculpting.

Women’s Rashguard Tops – protective and performance-ready.

Every style is made with purpose — luxury fabrics, ethical craftsmanship, and designs that last.

Ocean Soul Swimwear — Sustainable Luxury for Women Who Live for the Water.
